name: nuke-skills
description: Convergent multi-agent quality protocols: deep audits, diff reviews, implementation verification, phased fix-spec execution, feature spec compilation, root-cause debugging, mutation-proven tests, and a deep-reasoning discipline

plugins.name: nuke
plugins.description: Multi-agent quality skills — nuke-audit (convergent codebase audit), nuke-review (diff/PR review), nuke-verify (implementation verification with fix loop), nuke-fix (phased fix-spec execution), nuke-spec (feature request → build spec), nuke-debug (root-cause bug fixing), nuke-test (behavior tests proven by mutation), nuke-think (deep-reasoning discipline for judgment roles and hard calls)
